channel.title: 音楽ニュースリスト - Bluesky Feed

item.title: In this World Cup, VAR, or video assistant referee, has beco…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: In this World Cup, VAR, or video assistant referee, has become ubiquitous (and despised by many). But there was a time when fans and teams loved it. What went wrong? n.pr/4fGR7IE
item.content:encoded: In this World Cup, VAR, or video assistant referee, has become ubiquitous (and despised by many). But there was a time when fans and teams loved it. What went wrong? n.pr/4fGR7IE

item.title: Republicans are spending more money and running more ads on …
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Republicans are spending more money and running more ads on immigration than Democrats are ahead of the November midterm elections, according to an NPR analysis of advertisement data. n.pr/4f8osfp
item.content:encoded: Republicans are spending more money and running more ads on immigration than Democrats are ahead of the November midterm elections, according to an NPR analysis of advertisement data. n.pr/4f8osfp

item.title: Business is booming for Snap-on, a Wisconsin company that ha…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Business is booming for Snap-on, a Wisconsin company that has made tools for professional mechanics for more than a century. It recently got a fact-finding visit from the head of the Chicago Federal Reserve Bank. n.pr/4f5bkI2
item.content:encoded: Business is booming for Snap-on, a Wisconsin company that has made tools for professional mechanics for more than a century. It recently got a fact-finding visit from the head of the Chicago Federal Reserve Bank. n.pr/4f5bkI2
